meaning: adj.s.adj.p. As Soon As Possible 卵쫸찖
examples: The colonel ordered, "I want two good engines down here asap."
Have your salesman call me ASAP.
Check it out and get back to me ASAP.
So good that he'd want to implement it ASAP and give the Welsh government tax-raising powers?
The measures should be confirmed ASAP and nuclear plants that are now shut down reactivated.
